themes.name: [Negative] Poor UI and UX

quotes.text: The new update has a very bad UI and UX.
The Stocks UI is so confusing. How do I check my funds after I sell a stock?
UI can be improved.
Design needs overall update. Keep it simple and clear.
The new Dashboard cheap and not helpful.
Frequent updates shift menus and navigation, forcing users to relearn the app again and again.
farzii app hai ye logg bina nse ki website dekhe hi PCR value batane lagte hai jo loss karwate hai logo ka ..
order exicute par phle hi brokerage kaat lete hai our fir baad ne profit ko bhi transit money me rokk lete hai our fir wapas usme se bhi phle kati hui brokerage ko wapas kaat lete hai
please bhai logo esko leak ko sudhaaroo jo anjal one ya zeroodha walo ki tarhaa ham indmoney wale bhi profit me aaye
bekar ghatiya app isme transitions karne ke liye bad me charge leta hei
price grafix ko kyu bigad diya... update karne wale baad m app chala k nahi dekhate ki grafix m point k upper hi price show ho raha h.....

themes.description: Users have expressed frustration with the app's current design and navigation, citing difficulties with accessing core features, portfolio management, and overall user experience.
themes.business_impact: Difficulty with portfolio management and trading, increased user frustration and potential churn due to the lack of a consistent and intuitive UI.
themes.root_cause_hypothesis: The frequent changes to the app's UI and UX design, potentially driven by an overemphasis on new features without sufficient consideration for user experience.
themes.action_plan: • Implement a design freeze to stabilize the current UI, and then iterate on feedback from users to create a more consistent and intuitive experience. Collaborate closely with both UX Design and Product teams to ensure any new features are designed with the user experience in mind.

themes.description: The primary theme revolves around users appreciating Indmoney as an ideal platform for investing. They praise its ease of use, smooth interface, and ability to track and monitor investments. Users also appreciate the app's user-friendly interface and its capabilities in tracking financial growth with detailed insights and reports.
themes.business_impact: High user satisfaction and loyalty, potentially leading to positive word-of-mouth and repeat business
themes.root_cause_hypothesis: The app's success can be attributed to its user-centric approach, intuitive design, and seamless integration with various financial services
themes.action_plan:
• Continuously gather user feedback, enhance the app's features and functionalities to stay competitive, and maintain a high-quality user experience
• Invest in user education and support resources to alleviate any concerns or doubts users may have
• Regularly update the app to ensure compatibility with emerging technologies and financial services
